name: Cream of Broccoli Soup 4
recipeIngredient: 2 chicken bouillon cubes or 1 tbsp chicken base
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the broccoli and place it in a stockpot with water. Bring to a boil.
2. Add the chopped onion, bell pepper, and celery. Cook for 20 minutes or until tender.
3. Stir in the milk, chicken base (or chicken bouillon cubes), and Creole seasoning.
4. Mix in the blond roux and cook until thickened.
5. Yield: 6 servings.
Source: Chef Michael Chaisson C.W.C., printed in Cajun Revelation, sent to me from Cookie.Lady in the Old Cookbooks Looking for a New
